text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the first day of summer camp! Fine Motion has
been looking forward to it for a long time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion is determined to get as much as fun
as possible out of summer camp. She even ropes
in Air Shakur, who's irritated at having failed to
get the results she has wanted thus far.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While under her security team's protection, Fine
Motion plans to get stronger and take on the
Shuka Sho!
